query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A utility pole with multiple horizontal cross-arms and insulators stands against a dark night sky, photographed from a low upward angle. To the right of the pole, a bright circular light source emits a diffuse glow that radiates outward into the surrounding darkness. The pole and its hardware are rendered in deep shadow. A watermark reading skewsme.dpchallenge.com appears in the lower right corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grainy, underexposed night photograph shows a utility pole with multiple cross-arms and insulators rendered as a stark silhouette against a deeply shadowed sky. To the right, a bright circular light source burns with a diffuse halo that bleeds into the darkness. Heavy film grain textures the image, while a muted, desaturated palette and extreme underexposure that crushes the blacks create an oppressive atmosphere of isolation and atmospheric distress. A watermark reading skewsme.dpchallenge.com sits in the lower right corner.
